flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bellingham Technical College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.7k → $17.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bellingham Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $5.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bellingham Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $4.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bellingham Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
